title: [FEAT]: Revert to use H3 in the Title of the PR Updates in Realtime
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Polishing the Press
gist.blurb: Tuning the formatting for our social updates. Even the news bot needs a style guide.
gist.summary: Modified the real-time publishing script to use H3 headers and updated Discord tone guidelines for better readability.
gist.impact: Improves the visual formatting of automated PR updates in Discord channels.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot is acting as an editor, adjusting the font size of a headline on a digital newspaper while the Bee supervises with a tiny style guide.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the monitor robot adjusting the size of a header on a glowing digital document. The bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny red pen. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Robot and bee with chunky retro sprites. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text: 'H3'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
